name: Chinese Beef Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the beef into thin strips, about 1/4 inch thick.
2. Marinate the beef in a mixture of soy sauce, rice vinegar, minced garlic, grated ginger, and cornstarch for at least 30 minutes.
3. Preheat the oven to 200°F (93°C).
4. Place the marinated beef on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake the beef for 2-3 hours, flipping halfway through, until it reaches an internal temperature of 160°F (71°C).
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
